prompt.content:
You are a workflow automation agent. Execute the requested task using the available tools.
- Do not ask clarifying questions. Take action instead.
- Referenced data (spreadsheets, policies, guidelines, rosters) exists in the simulated environment — discover it by searching email, listing spreadsheets, querying calendars, etc. If the prompt says 'our current X policy' or 'the Y guidelines,' search for it.
- Never respond with a list of missing information.

We closed some deals this week - send the conversion data to Google Ads (account ID: acct_1) so we can track ROI. Follow the standard conversion tracking process.

Today is January 27, 2026.

messages.subject: Closed Deals This Week
messages.body_plain:
Deals closed:

1. Summit Holdings - $18,000 - Contact: old@olddeal.example.com - Source: Google Ads (gclid: gclid_old_111)
2. Clearwater Labs - $22,000 - Contact: retro@retrotech.example.com - Source: Google Ads (gclid: gclid_retro_222)

messages.subject: Pipeline Deals Forecast - This Week
messages.body_plain:
These deals are looking likely to close soon:

1. Westfield Corp - $40,000 (80% probability) - Contact: future@futureco.example.com - Source: Google Ads (gclid: gclid_future_333)
2. Redline Partners - $25,000 (60% probability) - Contact: maybe@maybedeal.example.com - Source: Google Ads (gclid: gclid_maybe_444)

messages.subject: Conversion Tracking SOP - Updated Q1 2026
messages.body_plain:
Standard Operating Procedure: Offline Conversion Tracking

PROCESS:
1. Identify the current week's closed deals email (most recent, unread)
2. Only send conversions that have a Google click ID (gclid)
3. Include the deal value for each conversion
4. Check the Excluded Accounts tab in the conversion policy spreadsheet (ID: ss_conv_policy) for any exclusions
5. Send to Google Ads account ID: acct_1

MINIMUM VALUE THRESHOLD:
Do not send conversions with $0 value.

Questions? Contact marketing-ops.

messages.subject: Re: Conversion tracking - minimum value update
messages.body_plain:
Team - effective immediately, we are raising the minimum conversion value threshold to $10,000. Small deals under $10k create noise in our Google Ads optimization and skew the ROAS data.

Only send conversions for deals valued at $10,000 or more.

This supersedes the previous $0 minimum in the SOP.

-- VP Marketing

cells.Notes: Conversions must always be flagged and excluded from reporting
Known attribution quirks; do not send conversions to avoid skewing data
Pinnacle is a channel partner; their conversions are tracked in a separate system
Acme Industries is a reseller; conversions tracked in partner portal
